title: Create a widget that will show the % of done tasks per month
excerpt:
Hello 
I’m trying to find a display to add to my dashboard that will show only the % of Done items per month or per selected timeframe 
Do you have any suggestions of which widget to use for this?

posts.author: mirmelsh (Roi Mirmelshtein)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello

I’m trying to find a display to add to my dashboard that will show only the % of Done items per month or per selected timeframe
Do you have any suggestions of which widget to use for this?
I tried to tweak the workload widget with no success…
Any idea?

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @mirmelsh !

This should be what you are looking for (though it also shows the percentage of other statuses) , let me know if you need anything else. Seeing only a percentage ( done items in your case) is the best of my knowledge not possible yet, but i’'ll let you know should I learn something.
